positive: A stylized, symmetrical minimalist representation of a forest in a hyper-simplified Art Nouveau stained-glass pattern. Central composition features interlocking silhouettes of majestic deer, ancient trees, and luminous celestial elements. Strong color direction using deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and antique gold accents, creating a high-contrast, jewel-toned print. Crisp line art, clean outlines, vectorized style, suitable for apparel transfer. Soft rim lighting, ethereal atmosphere, centered motif, highly detailed yet graphically clean.
negative: blur, sketch, messy, noisy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, out of frame, logo, trademark, cartoon, photorealism
